embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 resources with Cloud Configuration Findings [Logs Wiz]

b82ad425-99a4-4121-b7bb-40db21bb254e.label: Top 5 Wiz Cloud Configuration Finding Result Evaluation

params.markdown:
This dashboard shows the Cloud Configuration Findings overview related to the Wiz Integration.

This dashboard provides general statistics and shows the detection of ingested cloud configuration findings.

It provides information about findings and assets. It also displays the distribution of findings according to evaluation results and contains details regarding the count of findings over time.

[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/wiz/overview)
